subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of Bahá! Rejoice in what hath been showered upon thee from the clouds of mercy, in the grace that hath been lavishly bestowed upon thee, and in the radiance that hath dawned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه البهاء فاستبشری بما فاض علیک سحاب الرحمه و سبغت علیک النعمه و اشرقت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant
